# @pierre/trees

> An open source file tree rendering library for the web. Built on @headless-tree/core for state management, with React and vanilla JS APIs, SSR support, and customizable styling.

- Package: `@pierre/trees` on [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@pierre/trees)
- GitHub: https://github.com/pierrecomputer/pierre
- Install: `npm install @pierre/trees`

## Docs

- [Overview](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#overview): What file tree is, architecture, and getting started
- [Installation](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#installation): Package installation and entry points
- [Core Types](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#core-types): PathStoreFileTreeOptions, item handles, search modes, and configuration
- [React API](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#react-api): Using PathStoreFileTree in React with useEffect, SSR hydration
- [Path-Store API](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#path-store-api): PathStoreFileTree class, constructor options, instance methods, and mutations
- [Git Status](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#git-status): Git-style file status indicators with setGitStatus
- [Icons](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#icons): Custom SVG sprite sheets, icon tiers, and setIcons
- [Mutations](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#mutations): add, remove, move, batch, resetPaths, and onMutation events
- [Drag and Drop](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#drag-and-drop): PathStoreTreesDragAndDropConfig with canDrag, canDrop, and drop hooks
- [Composition](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#composition): Header slots and context menu composition options
- [Renaming](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#renaming): Inline file/folder renaming with PathStoreTreesRenamingConfig
- [Utilities](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#utilities): sortChildren, generateSyncDataLoader, generateLazyDataLoader (legacy)
- [Styling](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#styling): CSS variables and inline style overrides
- [Themes](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#themes): Theme integration with themeToTreeStyles and custom VS Code themes
- [SSR](https://diffs.com/preview/trees/docs#ssr): preloadPathStoreFileTree for server-side rendering and hydration

## See also

- [@pierre/diffs](https://diffs.com/llms.txt): Diff and code rendering library
- [Full documentation](https://diffs.com/trees/llms-full.txt): Complete @pierre/trees docs in a single file
